integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/atelier/mod.rs:506 sanitize_atelier_event_payload recursively maps sensitive keys (mod.rs:465-492) to sha256 content-addressed refs. tests/atelier_event_ledger_tests.rs:199 records an event then reads back atelier_event via store.pool() (:291), kernel_event_ledger (:364) and flight recorder (:373), asserting raw identity strings are absent and projected as sha256: refs (:314-395).

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-007 [Core-Data-Intake] Identity-Decoupled Artifact Naming -- Prevent character names and sensitive sheet fields from entering generated file paths/events via content-addressed naming.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Identity-Decoupled Artifact Naming
scope.summary: MT-007 [Core-Data-Intake] Identity-Decoupled Artifact Naming -- Prevent character names and sensitive sheet fields from entering generated file paths/events via content-addressed naming.
